mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.item_id, c.cost_date, c.mileage, c.cost, c.remark, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.create_by, c.update_by, c.del_flag, i.name AS item_name, i.address_id, a.name AS address_name FROM bus_item_cost c LEFT JOIN bus_item i ON c.item_id = i.id LEFT JOIN bus_address a ON i.address_id = a.id
c.del_flag = 0 AND i.family_id = #{familyId} AND i.address_id = #{addressId} AND c.item_id = #{itemId} AND c.cost_date >= #{costDateStart}::date AND c.cost_date <= #{costDateEnd}::date
ORDER BY c.cost_date DESC
